title: Carbonium
description: Minecraft modpack to improve for visual, convenience and optimization
body:
Carbonium modpack aim to optimize and improve minecraft.  

**About This Modpack:**
 
The Carbonium modpack is designed to make your Minecraft experience immersive with improved visuals and audio.There are also some quality-of-life features added to improve gameplay without making any significant alterations to vanilla Minecraft. 
The main features of Carbonium are visuals and optimization. All mods are completely client-based and you can play on any server or with friends. 
 
**Built on Fabric:** 

Carbonium uses the Fabric modloader, which support many mods and he stabilization minecraft. 


if you have any complaints, advice or bug reports, write to this [Discord]([https://discord.gg/KmFBxFZqJY])
